grader_results.details: score=4.0/5 (min=3.0): The annotation studio implements 7-8 of 9 required features with complete CRUD operations for skills, golden sets, tasks, rubrics, contracts, conventions, and calibration sessions, though some validation and navigation details are not fully visible. | Findings: [medium] src/app/golden-sets/[id]/page.tsx: Import feature is implemented but bulk import validation is not visible in the codebase; [low] src/app/conventions/page.tsx: Coverage matrix link exists but the actual coverage page is not in the provided files; [low] src/app/skills/[id]/edit/page.tsx: Edit skill page exists but form validation details not shown in truncated content; [low] src/app/layout.tsx: Navigation sidebar implementation not visible in the truncated layout file

score=5.0/5 (min=2.0): The codebase implements all 6 required comparison and trend analysis features comprehensively with well-structured components and clear visual indicators. | Findings: [low] src/components/runs/trend-chart.tsx: Chart includes basic moving average but lacks more sophisticated statistical indicators like standard deviation bands or confidence intervals; [low] src/components/runs/run-list.tsx:246-251: Visual regression indicators are subtle (small badges) and might benefit from more prominent display

score=5.0/5 (min=3.0): Excellent dashboard implementation with all 8 required features present and well-polished, including responsive grid layout and comprehensive observability metrics. | Findings: [low] lines 50-85: Latest run score calculation could be optimized with a single aggregated query instead of fetching all task results; [low] gateVariant function: no_go and no_go_absolute both return 'outline' variant, losing visual distinction

score=2.0/5 (min=2.0): Basic webhook endpoint exists but lacks all security, validation, and robustness features required for production CI/CD integration. | Findings: [critical] src/app/api/runs/webhook/route.ts: Webhook endpoint has no authentication - accepts any POST request; [high] src/app/api/runs/webhook/route.ts: No payload validation with Zod schema; [high] src/app/api/runs/webhook/route.ts: No duplicate run_id handling logic; [medium] src/app/api/runs/: No UI import endpoint - only webhook exists; [medium] src/app/api/runs/webhook/route.ts: File appears truncated or incomplete at 33 lines

score=3.0/5 (min=2.0): The codebase has backend API support and display functionality for postmortems, but lacks the creation form interface, resulting in an incomplete implementation. | Findings: [high] src/app/api/runs/[id]/postmortem/route.ts: Postmortem API exists but is not imported/referenced in the codebase; [medium] src/app/runs/[id]/page.tsx:lines 71-86: Postmortems are fetched and displayed but no creation form is implemented; [low] src/app/runs/[id]/page.tsx:line 196: Postmortem tab shows count but lacks create functionality
score=5.0/5 (min=3.0): All 8 required features are fully implemented with excellent UI/UX design, comprehensive dark mode support, and additional features beyond requirements.
